Package com.example.bugtracker50

package com.example.bugtracker50
  • Class
    Description
    AuthFilter
    AuthFilter is a servlet filter that intercepts requests to protected URLs such as "/edit-issue", "/new-issue", and "/user-details" to ensure that the user is authenticated before accessing these resources.
    ChangeLanguageServlet
    ChangeLanguageServlet handles requests to change the user's language preference.
    EditIssueServlet
    EditIssueServlet handles POST requests to edit an existing issue.
    FilterIssueServlet
    FilterIssueServlet handles POST requests to retrieve all issues as JSON.
    InitializationServlet
    InitializationServlet is executed on application startup to initialize the application environment.
    InitializationServlet.RepositoryType
    Enum representing available repository types.
    IssueDetailsServlet
    IssueDetailsServlet handles GET requests to retrieve detailed information about a specific issue in JSON format.
    JsonResponse<T>
    JsonResponse is a generic container for sending JSON responses that include both the main data and localized field labels.
    ListServlet
    ListServlet handles GET requests to retrieve a list of all issues in JSON format.
    LoginServlet
    LoginServlet handles POST requests for user authentication.
    LogoutServlet
    LogoutServlet handles user logout requests.
    NewIssueServlet
    NewIssueServlet handles POST requests to create a new issue in the system.
    UserServlet
    UserServlet handles GET requests to retrieve details of the currently logged-in user.
    UsersListServlet
    UsersListServlet handles GET requests to retrieve the list of all users in JSON format.
